rawAssistant: One moment I was checking the canal's water levels, and the next, a group of refugees came rushing down our way, shouting about some sort of lowland glow. They're still spooked, but they think it might be connected to an old keepsake clue from their village elder. If you're heading north on the road, you should see what's left of that keepsake buried in the mud near the old windmill. Just watch out for any signs of trouble – I've seen some nasty creatures stirring up in these parts lately.
